CustomField.description: DD feedback : automatically filled in by WTP Organisator Feedback (WTP.Contact_Owner_Feedback__c) when : a due dilligence is related to the opportunity related due dil is closed the present field is still empty when DD is closed
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Please type here any important comment related to due diligence related to this opportunity. Notice that Due Diligence Organizator Feedback posted on related Work Together Process (if such WTP exists) will automatically fill this field when set to closed
CustomField.label: Due Diligence Feedback
